harness: SqlAgent — compact schema-in-prompt, JSON mode, execute-and-repair (max 2 repair turns), temperature 0

results.question: What are the top 5 best-selling genres by total sales?
results.sql: SELECT g.Name AS Genre, SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity) AS TotalSales FROM Genre g JOIN Track t ON g.GenreId = t.GenreId JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId GROUP BY g.GenreId, g.Name ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 5

results.question: List all albums by the artist 'AC/DC'.
results.sql: SELECT Album.Title FROM Album JOIN Artist ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId WHERE Artist.Name = 'AC/DC'

results.question: What are the names and email addresses of customers from Brazil?
results.sql: SELECT FirstName, LastName, Email FROM Customer WHERE Country = 'Brazil'

results.question: What is the most popular media type based on number of tracks?
results.sql: SELECT mt.Name AS MediaTypeName, COUNT(t.TrackId) AS TrackCount FROM MediaType mt JOIN Track t ON mt.MediaTypeId = t.MediaTypeId GROUP BY mt.MediaTypeId, mt.Name ORDER BY TrackCount DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Which employee has the most customers assigned to them?
results.sql: SELECT e.FirstName ||' '|| e.LastName AS EmployeeName, COUNT(c.CustomerId) AS CustomerCount FROM Employee e JOIN Customer c ON e.EmployeeId = c.SupportRepId GROUP BY e.EmployeeId ORDER BY CustomerCount DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: How many tracks are there in each playlist?
results.sql: SELECT p.Name AS PlaylistName, COUNT(pt.TrackId) AS TrackCount FROM Playlist p LEFT JOIN PlaylistTrack pt ON p.PlaylistId = pt.PlaylistId GROUP BY p.PlaylistId, p.Name ORDER BY TrackCount DESC

results.question: What is the total revenue generated in the year 2021?
results.sql: SELECT SUM(Total) AS TotalRevenue FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) = '2021'

results.question: What is the average invoice total for each billing country, ordered from highest to lowest?
results.sql: SELECT BillingCountry, AVG(Total) AS AverageInvoiceTotal FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry ORDER BY AverageInvoiceTotal DESC

results.question: For each customer, what is their total spending and how does it rank compared to other customers? Show the top 5 customers by spending.
results.sql: SELECT c.FirstName || ' ' || c.LastName AS CustomerName, SUM(i.Total) AS TotalSpending, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(i.Total) DESC) AS SpendingRank FROM Customer c JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId GROUP BY c.CustomerId ORDER BY TotalSpending DESC LIMIT 5

results.question: Which artists have tracks in more than 3 different genres? List the artist name and the number of distinct genres.
results.sql: SELECT ar.Name AS ArtistName, COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) AS GenreCount FROM Artist ar JOIN Album al ON ar.ArtistId = al.ArtistId JOIN Track t ON al.AlbumId = t.AlbumId GROUP BY ar.ArtistId, ar.Name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.GenreId) > 3

results.question: How many tracks are longer than the average track length (in milliseconds)?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track WHERE Milliseconds > (SELECT AVG(Milliseconds) FROM Track)

results.question: Bucket tracks by length: short (< 3 min), medium (3–5 min), long (> 5 min). How many tracks are in each bucket?
results.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN Milliseconds < 180000 THEN 'short' WHEN Milliseconds BETWEEN 180000 AND 300000 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'long' END AS length_bucket, COUNT(*) AS track_count FROM Track GROUP BY length_bucket

results.question: Which employees do not report to a manager? Show their full name and title.
results.sql: SELECT FirstName ||' '|| LastName AS FullName, Title FROM Employee WHERE ReportsTo IS NULL

results.question: How many invoices were issued in the first quarter of 2022 (January through March)?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS InvoiceCount FROM Invoice WHERE strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) = '2022' AND strftime('%m', InvoiceDate) IN ('01', '02', '03')

results.question: List each employee with their manager's name. Include employees who have no manager (show the manager column as NULL).
results.sql: SELECT e.FirstName ||' '|| e.LastName AS EmployeeName, m.FirstName ||' '|| m.LastName AS ManagerName FROM Employee e LEFT JOIN Employee m ON e.ReportsTo = m.EmployeeId

results.question: How many distinct countries do we have customers in?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Country) FROM Customer

results.question: List every distinct country that appears either as a customer's country or as an invoice's billing country. Order alphabetically.
results.sql: SELECT Country AS Country FROM Customer UNION SELECT BillingCountry AS Country FROM Invoice ORDER BY Country

results.question: What is the average number of tracks per album, across all albums?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT AlbumId) AS avg_tracks_per_album FROM Track

results.question: List all employees and the number of customers they support. Show 0 for employees who support no customers. Order by customer count descending, then by employee name.
results.sql: SELECT e.FirstName ||' '|| e.LastName AS EmployeeName, COUNT(c.CustomerId) AS CustomerCount FROM Employee e LEFT JOIN Customer c ON e.EmployeeId = c.SupportRepId GROUP BY e.EmployeeId, e.FirstName, e.LastName ORDER BY CustomerCount DESC, EmployeeName

results.question: How many tracks have the word 'love' (case-insensitive) anywhere in their name?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track WHERE LOWER(Name) LIKE '%love%'

results.question: What is the longest track in each genre? Show the genre name, the track name, and the length in milliseconds. Order by genre name.
results.sql:
SELECT g.Name AS GenreName, t.Name AS TrackName, t.Milliseconds AS Length
FROM Genre g
JOIN Track t ON g.GenreId = t.GenreId
WHERE t.Milliseconds = (
    SELECT MAX(Milliseconds)
    FROM Track
    WHERE GenreId = g.GenreId
)
ORDER BY g.Name

results.question: Bucket invoices by total: small (< $5), medium ($5–$10), large (> $10). Show the count of invoices in each bucket.
results.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN Total < 5 THEN 'small' WHEN Total BETWEEN 5 AND 10 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'large' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS invoice_count FROM Invoice GROUP BY bucket

results.question: What was the total revenue in the last 6 months of available invoice data?
results.sql: SELECT SUM(Total) AS TotalRevenue FROM Invoice WHERE InvoiceDate >= date((SELECT MAX(InvoiceDate) FROM Invoice), '-6 months')

results.question: Who is the top-spending customer for each support rep? Show the rep's name, the customer's name, and the customer's total spending. Order by total spending descending.
results.sql: SELECT e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS RepName, c.FirstName || ' ' || c.LastName AS CustomerName, SUM(i.Total) AS TotalSpending FROM Employee e JOIN Customer c ON e.EmployeeId = c.SupportRepId JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId GROUP BY e.EmployeeId, c.CustomerId HAVING SUM(i.Total) = (SELECT SUM(i2.Total) FROM Customer c2 JOIN Invoice i2 ON c2.CustomerId = i2.CustomerId WHERE c2.SupportRepId = e.EmployeeId GROUP BY c2.CustomerId ORDER BY SUM(i2.Total) DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY TotalSpending DESC

results.question: Which customers in cities starting with 'S' have more than 1 invoice? Show their name, city, and invoice count. Order by invoice count descending, then by customer name.
results.sql: SELECT c.FirstName ||' '|| c.LastName AS CustomerName, c.City, COUNT(i.InvoiceId) AS InvoiceCount FROM Customer c JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId WHERE c.City LIKE 'S%' GROUP BY c.CustomerId, c.FirstName, c.LastName, c.City HAVING COUNT(i.InvoiceId) > 1 ORDER BY InvoiceCount DESC, CustomerName
